study_title: Use of waggle dance information in honey bees is linked to gene expression in the antennae, but not in the brain
exp_title: RNA-Seq of Apis mellifera: SI antennal lobes
design: Hiseq 4000 was used to sequence 100 base pair (bp) paired-end reads, obtaining 40 Mio clean reads per sample. The total sample size was 28.
lab: Institute for Organismic and Molecular Evolutions
